summary: Verified new AI personas (Dave, Mo, Helen, Reg) are working correctly. Fixed portal rebuild issue and added personas to database. All 14 backend tests pass.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Portal displays all 20 AI team members

seed_data_creation: Added dave, mo, helen, reg to ai_characters MongoDB collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: New AI personas (Dave, Mo, Helen, Reg) have been verified. Key findings: (1) Backend chat API correctly returns characterName for all 4 new personas. (2) Portal page.tsx had all 20 personas in aiTeam array but needed rebuild. (3) Database ai_characters collection was missing the 4 new personas - added them. (4) Updated portal text from '16' to '20' AI Battle Buddies. (5) All persona prompts contain expected specialist content (men's health, recovery, carer support, serious illness).

characters_endpoint_lists_new_personas.details: GET /api/ai-buddies/characters includes dave, mo, helen, reg

portal_displays_20_personas.details: Portal AI Team section shows all 20 personas including Dave, Mo, Helen, Reg

portal_text_updated.details: Portal shows '20 unique AI Battle Buddies' instead of '16'

tommy_regression.details: Tommy chat still works correctly (regression test)

persona_prompts_content.details: All 4 new persona prompts contain expected specialist content

Added dave, mo, helen, reg to ai_characters MongoDB collection
